lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Welcome, are you looking to take part in a game of Last Man Standing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: It's simple. Anyone looking to participate enters the relevant waiting area. Once the waiting area has enough people, they are taken to the arena.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Arena?

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Indeed. We have set up two arenas on another plane. When a game starts, we pick one at random. Once everyone arrives in the arena, the fight for survival begins.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Now, there's a few important things to be aware of. While in an arena, your physical and mental abilities will be boosted. Also, praying to the gods will not cost you any precious energies.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: After a game has started, lethal fog will soon start filling the arena. This forces contenders to a designated safe zone and ensures no one escapes the fighting.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Be aware, you can't take any of your own belongings into the game. Instead, you can use only what you find in the arena, including anything we give you on arrival.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Regarding what you are given on arrival, you have a few options to pick from. Use my supply chest to configure your load-outs for the different battle styles.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Remember, this is a solo competition! Anyone attempting to form teams for an unfair advantage will be banished from further participation.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Now that you know more, would you like to take part in a game of Last Man Standing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: No problem, come back if you happen to change your mind.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Welcome, are you looking to take part in a game of Last Man Standing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to play.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Which mode would you like to play?

sections.title: When not on an official LMS world

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: I'm afraid you can't take part in Last Man Standing on this world.

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: A casual game will start in the next [60 - 5x] seconds!

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: A casual game is starting!

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Come on, we need another competitive participant!

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Come on, we need [2-24] more competitive participants!

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Come on, we need another High Stakes participant!

lines.speaker: Lisa
lines.text: Come on, we need [2-24] more High Stakes participants!
